# SupaCode Starter
> A working TanStack Start scaffold from SupaCode. SSR by default. SEO and AEO scaffolds. OKLCH design tokens. h3 swallow workaround included.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://example.supacode.dev/): What's in the starter and how to get moving.
- [About](https://example.supacode.dev/about): Architectural decisions and SUP-SSR project mapping.

## What this starter ships with
- SSR via TanStack Start + Cloudflare Workers/Pages
- SEO primitives: per-route head(), canonical URLs, Open Graph, robots.txt, sitemap.xml builder
- AEO toolkit: eight JSON-LD generators, llms.txt builder
- Brand System v5 design tokens in OKLCH
- The h3 swallow workaround (SUP-SSR-003) for SSR error recovery
- Conservative 7-day supply-chain freshness budget
- ESLint guards against Next.js drift and *.gen.ts edits

## What this starter does not include
- Authentication (add your own)
- Database (add Supabase or D1 as needed)
- Payment (SupaPay-on-SSR ships separately per Bet 5)
- The Edison SEO Agent (full agent shipping with SupaCode v0.6)

## Notes
- This file is human-authored as a sample. In a full SupaCode build, llms.txt and llms-full.txt are auto-generated by @supacode/seo-toolkit at build time.
- See src/lib/seo/llms-txt.ts for the builder API.
